title: BacklightTimer68XXDevice
description:
* `ALWAYS_ON` - Keep the phone's backlight always on.
 * `TEN_SEC` - Set the phone's backlight to be on for ten seconds.
 * `TWENTY_SEC` - Set the phone's backlight to be on for twenty seconds.
 * `THIRTY_SEC` - Set the phone's backlight to be on for thirty seconds.
 * `OFF` - Keep the phone's backlight off.
